channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Clean up idle and always-failing Azure Logic App Consumption
item.description: If you’ve inherited an Azure subscription that’s been collecting Logic Apps Consumption workflows for a couple of years, you already know the shape of the problem: dozens of TestLA, webhook-test-2, poc-for-jira-FINAL workflows in the portal, half of them still Enabled, half of them quietly failing...
item.dc:creator: Yanbo_Deng

item.title: You Can Scale MCP Servers Behind a Load Balancer on App Service — Here's How
item.description: Most MCP servers in the wild are single-instance processes. That's fine when they're driving a local Claude or VS Code session — but it's the wrong shape for a production agent fleet that has to absorb traffic spikes, ride through deploys, and survive instance failures. The good news: the MCP spec...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: Run Javascript code on Agent Loop
item.description: We have recently introduced support for Code interpreters inside of Azure Logic Apps Agent Loop, extending the support we had for Python. When partnered with a LLM, this allow builders to express their goals or intents via natural language and obtain executable results. These capabilities become...
item.dc:creator: WSilveira

item.title: Copilot usage metrics reports now use GitHub-owned download URLs
item.description: As previously announced, the download URLs for Copilot usage metrics reports have migrated from Azure Front Door domains to a stable, GitHub-owned custom domain. This change improves URL stability and… The post Copilot usage metrics reports now use GitHub-owned download URLs appeared first on The...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL Server on Azure VMs in Malaysia West, Indonesia Central
item.description: SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines is now generally available in the Malaysia West and Indonesia Central Azure regions. With this regional expansion, you can deploy and manage SQL Server workloads closer to your users while helping meet data residency r
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [In preview] Update: Microsoft Entra ID token refresh support for Python, .NET, and JavaScript in Azure Database for PostgreSQL
item.description: You can now take advantage of Microsoft Entra ID token refresh support in Python, .NET, and JavaScript client libraries to simplify authentication in your applications backed by Azure Database for PostgreSQL. With this release, your applications can autom
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Announcing Public Preview of Argo CD extension in AKS Azure Portal Experience
item.description: We are excited to announce the public preview of Argo CD in the Azure Portal for Azure Kubernetes Service. As GitOps becomes the standard for deploying and operating applications at scale, customers need a way to adopt GitOps with simpler onboarding, secure defaults, and integrated workflows. With...
item.dc:creator: Samantha_Fernandez

item.title: Ansible + Azure Arc: Manage Arc Extensions with New Ansible Modules
item.description: We’re excited to announce new modules in Ansible Galaxy that make it easier to manage Azure Arc machine extensions at scale. With the latest updates to the azure.azcollection on Ansible Galaxy, you can now deploy and manage Azure Arc extensions using familiar, declarative Ansible workflows. These...
item.dc:creator: alinetran

item.title: What’s New in Agent 365: May 2026
item.description: By Alex Pozin, Samer Baroudi As we celebrate the general availability of Agent 365, we’re sharing a closer look at the core capabilities that help organizations adopt agents at scale, responsibly and with speed. Agent 365 is built on three core value pillars: observe, govern, and secure, designed...
item.dc:creator: alexpozin

item.title: Investigating unauthorized access to GitHub-owned repositories
item.description: If any impact is discovered, customers will be notified via established incident response and notification channels. The post Investigating unauthorized access to GitHub-owned repositories appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Natalie Guevara

item.title: Summarized Gateway Prefixes for Route Advertisement in Azure Virtual Networks
item.description: Background Many Azure deployments follow a hub-and-spoke topology: one VNet is designated as the hub and holds the connection to on-premises (via ExpressRoute Gateway, VPN Gateway, or both), and workload VNets — the spokes — peer to the hub to reach on-premises and shared services. This centralizes...
item.dc:creator: jl-ms

item.title: From Coding Agents to Cloud Automation: AI-Assisted Customer Related Incidents in Azure Functions
item.description: On the Azure Functions team, we have been exploring how AI can help with investigating customer-reported incidents, root-cause analysis, and incident mitigation. This post shares our journey from early RCA agents to coding-agent-assisted investigations and cloud-hosted automation, and the lessons...
item.dc:creator: Tsuyoshi_Ushio

item.title: Mini Shai Hulud: Compromised @antv npm packages enable CI/CD credential theft
item.description: Compromised @antv npm packages deploy the Mini Shai-Hulud payload to steal CI/CD secrets from Linux-based automation environments. The malware executes during npm install and targets credentials across GitHub, AWS, Kubernetes, Vault, npm, and 1Password platforms. The post Mini Shai Hulud:...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: langchain-azure-cosmosdb python package for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description: You can now build production-ready AI and agent applications faster using the new LangChain and LangGraph integration for Azure Cosmos DB. This Python package enables you to directly use Cosmos DB for vector and hybrid search, semantic caching, chat histo
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Updates to available models in Copilot on web
item.description: We have updated our available model selection for Copilot Chat on the web to deliver more consistent, high-quality responses. What’s changed While model choice is valuable, we are limiting the… The post Updates to available models in Copilot on web appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Storage Mover Blob-to-Blob migration
item.description: Azure Storage Mover now supports Blob container-to-Blob container data transfers, enabling customers to move data seamlessly across regions, subscriptions, and accounts with a fully managed experience. Customers can now use Azure Storage Mover to migrate
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Schedule one-time or recurring migrations with Azure Storage Mover
item.description: Azure Storage Mover now supports built-in job scheduling, giving customers more control over when migrations run and making it easier to automate repeatable data transfers into Azure. Customers can configure jobs to start automatically at a specific date
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Your dev loop is full of tribal knowledge
item.description: Aspire turns a team's scattered tribal knowledge into an explicit, incrementally-adoptable app model that humans, scripts, and AI agents can all use. The post Your dev loop is full of tribal knowledge appeared first on Aspire Blog.
item.dc:creator: David Fowler

item.title: Visual Studio Code 1.121
item.description: Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.121 Read the full article
item.dc:creator: Visual Studio Code Team

item.title: v1.15.4
item.description: 1.15.4 (May 20, 2026) NEW FEATURES: We now produce builds for Linux s390x (zLinux) (#38615) BUG FIXES: init: Prevent provider binaries from being installed into symlinked directories (#38611)
item.dc:creator: hc-github-team-es-release-engineering

item.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Summarized advertised gateway prefixes for route advertisement
item.description: Summarized advertised gateway prefixes for route advertisement is now in public preview, enabling you to define summarized prefixes that Azure gateways, including ExpressRoute and VPN Gateway, advertise to on-premises networks, instead of advertising all
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: site-to-site VPN connections with certificate authentication
item.description: Azure Site-to-Site VPN with digital certificate authentication provides an alternative to the traditional pre-shared key (PSK) model by using a certificate-based asymmetric trust model. In this configuration, Azure and the on-premises VPN device authentic
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Agents League: The Esports-Inspired Hackathon Where AI Agents Battle for Glory
item.description: Ready to put your AI skills to the ultimate test? Agents League is here, a dynamic, esports-inspired developer challenge that brings the thrill of live competition to the world of agentic AI. Whether you're a seasoned AI developer or just getting started, this is your chance to build, compete, and...
item.dc:creator: Lee_Stott

item.title: Securing the gaming culture of cultures
item.description: Read about the unique challenges and rewards of securing gaming platforms and how to better protect gaming communities. The post Securing the gaming culture of cultures appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Zollman

item.title: Auto model selection now routes based on your task in VS Code
item.description: GitHub Copilot auto model selection now routes to the best model for your task, using utilization and model health metrics for a high quality, reliable, and token-efficient experience. How it… The post Auto model selection now routes based on your task in VS Code appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Event Grid Subscription Identifiers
item.description: Gain more flexibility in message handling with Subscription Identifiers by enabling subscribers to identify which subscription triggered delivery, helping streamline client-side processing in more advanced MQTT scenarios. Together, these enhanc
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Event Grid releases for April 2026
item.description: Azure Event Grid namespaces are expanding MQTT capabilities to help organizations build more connected, scalable, and MQTT V5 standards-based real-time solutions. These updates make it easier to deliver responsive device experiences, simplify backend inte
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Introducing RAMPART and Clarity: Open source tools to bring safety into Agent development workflow
item.description: The AI systems shipping inside enterprises today are fundamentally different from the ones we were building even two years ago, because they have moved well past answering questions and into accessing your email, retrieving records from your CRM, writing and executing code, and taking actions on...
item.dc:creator: Ram Shankar Siva Kumar

item.title: Semantic issue search in Copilot Chat
item.description: You can use natural language in GitHub Copilot Chat on web to quickly find, group, and analyze issues, with context-aware results powered by a new semantic issues index. What’s new… The post Semantic issue search in Copilot Chat appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Bulk-configure diagnostic settings on Azure Logic Apps Consumptions
item.description: Bulk-configure diagnostic settings on Azure Logic Apps — without clicking through the Portal LA-BulkDiag is a small, single-file PowerShell script that does the whole job in one guided run. It enumerates every Consumption Logic App in a resource group, shows you which ones already have settings,...
item.dc:creator: Yanbo_Deng

item.title: How to Visualize Your Azure AI Workloads Usage for Observability
item.description: This article assumes you already have an Azure Foundry project and resource deployed in Microsoft Foundry. The options referenced here are documented in detail in the linked articles; this post serves as a consolidated step by step guide bringing them all together and explaining where each option...
item.dc:creator: juneesingh

item.title: Golden Image Refresh for Virtual Machines and VM Scale Sets: Driving Consistency at Scale
item.description: Overview: A golden image is a prebuilt, approved system template that represents the ideal baseline for deployment. It includes: Hardened operating system configuration (e.g., RHEL) Preinstalled software and dependencies Security patches and updates Organizational compliance standards Architecture:...
item.dc:creator: ranjsharma

item.title: Announcing etcd 3.7.0-beta.0
item.description: SIG-Etcd announces the availability of the first beta release of etcd v3.7.0. This new version of the popular distributed database and key Kubernetes component includes the long-requested RangeStream feature, as well as a refactoring and cleanup of multiple legacy components and interfaces. v3.7...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Applying Site Reliability Engineering to Autonomous AI Agents
item.description: If you practice SRE, you already have a mental model for running reliable production systems. You define SLOs. You track error budgets. You use circuit breakers to stop cascading failures. You run chaos experiments to find weaknesses before customers do. You treat every operational decision as a...
item.dc:creator: mosiddi

item.title: Launched: Microsoft 365 Copilot Adoption Hub Redesign
item.description: One of the biggest barriers to Copilot adoption is people don’t always know where to start. Today, we released the first version of our redesigned Microsoft 365 Copilot business user hub. Take a look. We set out to simplify adoption by making the experience more practical and focused on key roles:...
item.dc:creator: Karuana_Gatimu_MSFT

item.title: Deploy with Confidence: Using Rule Impact Analyzer in Azure Virtual Network Manager
item.description: Introduction In a previous blog post, we described how Azure Virtual Network Manager (AVNM) enables central teams to enforce security admin rules across hundreds of virtual networks—bring consistency and governance to complex enterprise environments. But enforcement at scale introduces a new...
item.dc:creator: jl-ms

item.title: Easily apply Copilot code review feedback with Copilot cloud agent
item.description: Copilot code review’s previous Implement suggestion button has now been renamed to Fix with Copilot and updated to support a UI dialog for more control over how suggestions are applied.… The post Easily apply Copilot code review feedback with Copilot cloud agent appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Simplified access to Hotpatching enabled by Azure Arc for Windows Server 2025
item.description: With Windows Server 2025, we introduced hotpatch enabled by Azure Arc, delivering security updates to Windows Server across hybrid and multicloud environments – minimizing downtime (no reboot), accelerating protection, and unifying patch management. We know that keeping your servers updated with...
item.dc:creator: sharmajyoti

item.title: Public preview: Expanded coverage and unified management for SQL VA Express Configuration
item.description: SQL Vulnerability Assessment (SQL VA) is a core capability in Defender for SQL that helps customers identify possible misconfigurations, excessive permissions, and other deviations from security best practices through continuous scanning of their databases. Traditionally, enabling SQL VA on SQL...
item.dc:creator: Catalin Esanu

item.title: Azure API Center portal is now generally available
item.description: What Is the API Center Portal? The API Center portal is a hosted, provisioned and managed by Azure, where developers across your organization can discover, explore, and consume APIs. The API Center portal provides a multi-gateway, organization-wide view of every API and AI asset (e.g. plugins, MCP...
item.dc:creator: Sreekanth_Thirthala

item.title: Azure Arc Server April 2026 Forum
item.description: Please find the recording for the monthly Azure Arc Server Forum on YouTube! During the April 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, we discussed: Public Preview of Essential Machine Management, learn more at aka.ms/EMM-blog and sign up at aka.ms/EMM-feedback Engage with product group on exploration of AI on...
item.dc:creator: Aurnov_Chattopadhyay

item.title: Agentic AI for Linux Operations on Azure: The Prompts
item.description: Try This Yourself: Agentic AI for Linux Operations on Azure At Red Hat Summit 2026, I handed GitHub Copilot CLI a terminal and asked it to deploy a full-stack application to RHEL 10 on Azure. Live. From a single prompt. No scripts, no runbooks, no pre-baked automation. The audience watched every...
item.dc:creator: abbottkarl

item.title: Metrics Filtering and Log Aggregation Now GA for Advanced Container Networking Services
item.description: We are thrilled to announce that Advanced Container Networking Services (ACNS) for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) now delivers two powerful observability features in General Availability: container network metrics filtering and container network log filtering and aggregation. Together, these...
item.dc:creator: chandanAggarwal

item.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google’s latest Flash-tier model, is now rolling out on GitHub Copilot. In our early testing, Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers near-Pro coding quality at Flash-tier speed and cost… The post Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available for GitHub Copilot appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Expanded OIDC support for Dependabot and code scanning
item.description: Dependabot and code scanning now support OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication for private registries configured at the organization level for two additional registries: Cloudsmith and Google Artifact Registry. What’s new Organization… The post Expanded OIDC support for Dependabot and code scanning...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Evaluate feature rollouts with Azure App Configuration Scorecards
item.description: Azure App Configuration now supports a scorecards capability in public preview. Scorecards provide a telemetry-driven view of how feature flag variants are performing in production, helping teams identify measurable changes after a rollout without manuall
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files cache volumes
item.description: Azure NetApp Files cache volumes is now Generally Available. Azure NetApp Files now support cache volumes, which are cloud-based caches of an external origin volume, containing only the most actively accessed data on the volume. This brings data and files
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Virtual Network updates – default limits increased for NSGs and route tables
item.description: Azure Virtual Network has increased the default platform limits for network security groups (NSGs) and route tables. The new defaults are now 2,000 security rules per NSG, 6,000 addresses or ports per NSG rule, 1,000 routes per route table, and 600 route
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Network Watcher rule impact analyser
item.description: Azure Network Watcher rule impact analyzer is now generally available, enabling you to assess the potential impact of your network security group (NSG) or security admin rule changes on live network traffic before applying them. With this capability, you
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Announcing general availability of Azure Intel® TDX confidential VMs
item.description: We’re excited to announce the general availability of Azure’s next generation of confidential virtual machines, powered by 5th Gen Intel® Xeon® processors with Intel® Trust Domain Extensions (Intel® TDX). These new confidential VMs make it easier than ever for organizations to move their most...
item.dc:creator: simranparkhe
